markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content audit findings and improvement strategies for GrowthX's content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality varies: \~30% great, \~40% okay, \~30% needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [New client onboarding process to include custom workflows and detailed writing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Shifting focus from word count to article quality and client-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Transitioning off AirOps by June 10th to gain more flexibility in workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit Findings

  - [\~30% of content across 40 pieces is high-quality with minor tweaks needed](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [\~40% is satisfactory](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [\~30% needs significant improvement or shouldn't be live](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Common issues:](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Overuse of "blank blank: blank blank" headline structure (in \~70% of content)](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [LLM-generated statistics without proper sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [Word whiskers specific to LLM outputs (e.g., "game-changer", "robust")](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Skeletal structure with repetitive single-sentence H3s and bullet points](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Client-Specific Content Challenges

  - [Seat example: Client requested concise, scannable content under 1,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Push for brevity led to skeletal structure with multiple bullet lists](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Highlights need for balancing client requests with content best practices](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Moving away from word count-based SoWs to article-based agreements](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Creating custom workflows for each client during sprint operations](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Developing detailed, client-specific writing instructions (e.g., Aimbit case study)](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Planning to incorporate client feedback and editor revisions into LLM training](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Platform Transition

  - [Urgent need to transition off AirOps by June 10th](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [New platform will offer more flexibility in workflow design and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Transition period may slow down some improvement initiatives temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Content Creation Process Enhancements

  - [Matthew now reviewing and editing calibration articles before client presentation](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Implementing custom workflows and writing instructions for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Planning to retroactively create custom workflows for existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Aiming to increase leverage through workflow improvements, allowing teams to handle more content with less stress](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete transition from AirOps to new platform by June 10th](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Develop and implement custom workflows for new and existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Create detailed, client-specific writing instructions based on feedback and revisions](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Continue refining content creation process to balance quality, efficiency, and client needs](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Address "oxygen-stealing" elements like overpromising features to clients before development](https://fathom.video/share/mFF7HvPxTBsfXrhxGAiQQyGF7p2_FAFH?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
